    • Uses of LocalInputSource in com.mindee.image

      Methods in com.mindee.image that return LocalInputSource 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      LocalInputSource ExtractedImage.asInputSource()
      Return the image in a format suitable for sending to MindeeClient for parsing.
      LocalInputSource PDFPageImage.asInputSource()
      Return the image in a format suitable for sending to MindeeClient for parsing.
